Notes: Skidmore outscored RPI, 25-0 over the game's final 10:57, but the Red Hawks
hung on for the 54-52 UCAA win.  Andrea Paulson scored 12 of her game-high
18 points in the second half.  Kristin Kaczynski led RPI with 17 points.
